title: Catalana Savoy Cabbage Fritters
description: A crispy Spanish-inspired fritter filled with cabbage, onions, and a hint of catalana.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a bowl, combine cabbage, onion, and catalana sauce.
Roll out pastry dough and cut into squares.
Spoon cabbage mixture onto one square, leaving space around the edges.
Dampen edges with water and fold pastry squares in half to form triangles.
Press edges to seal and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot with savory crema.
Optional: serve with a side of tangy slaw for added crunch.
